Properties.AlarmDescription: Alert when clinic-images Lambda has errors
Alert when clinic-images Lambda is throttled
Alert when clinic-images Lambda p99 duration exceeds 24000ms (~80% of timeout)

ImagesBucketName.Description: Name of the S3 bucket for clinic images

ImagesTableName.Description: Name of the DynamoDB table for image metadata

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
